title: U.S. Naval Institute's Ship's Store
text:
Shop Our Ship's Store
Show your U.S. Naval Institute pride wherever you go with a selection of t-shirts, hoodies, hats, notebooks, and more in our Ship's Store.
Members get 20% off all orders year-round. Already a member? Just watch your email and Member Dashboard for the discount code.
Join today
The Naval Institute is a registered 501(c)(3) educational nonprofit. All proceeds from the Ship's Store will go toward funding the Naval Institute's mission to advance the professional, literary, and scientific understanding of sea power and the critical issues shaping global security.
Thank you for your continued support!
Tips For Using Our Store
You will need to make an account on the store site to make a purchase as it is managed outside of usni.org.
When filling out your shipping address:
Use the autofill dropdown when it appears.
Use the dropdown menu to select the state instead of typing it in.
State cannot be abbreviated.
All items are made to order and will ship in about four weeks.
Note that we are currently unable to fulfill international shipping requests. We hope to add this in the near future, but for now we recommend sending to a family member or friend with a U.S.-based address.
Have other questions? Contact our partner Marco Promotion directly at stores@marcopromos.com or via their webform, or check our Frequently Asked Questions.
